subject: ASAP: Fullstack Engineer – TypeScript – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a mid Fullstack Engineer with strong experience in TypeScript. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• TypeScript
• Docker
• Redis
• Kafka

Details:
Client: MediLink
Start: ASAP
Duration: 6 months
Location: Malmö (remote)
Rate: competitive (details on request)

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Ida Fredriksson
Account Manager
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 73 566 78 90
